subcodes.first_line: O servant! Be thou faithful to the trust of thy Lord - which is the love of God and the love of His chosen ones - and withhold not thyself [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد کن امینا فی امانه ربک و هی حب الله و حب اصفیائه و لاتمنع نفسک عن
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @development of capacity and readiness, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @love of God
